# CV Chap Chap

> CV Chap Chap is a professional CV and cover letter builder designed for the Tanzanian and East African job market. It offers AI-powered content suggestions, 6 curated CV templates, and mobile-first design optimised for the 90% of users accessing from mobile devices.

## About

CV Chap Chap helps job seekers in Tanzania and East Africa create professional, interview-winning CVs and cover letters. The platform uses AI (GPT-4o) to suggest job descriptions, skills, and professional summaries tailored to local market expectations. Payment is handled via Tanzania mobile money (Selcom).

## Features

- AI-powered CV content suggestions (job descriptions, skills, professional summary)
- 6 professional CV templates: Charles, Grace, Kathleen, Oliver, Aparna, and more
- Cover letter builder with matching templates
- PDF download of finished CV
- Mobile-first design (works from 320px width)
- Affiliate programme for referrals
- Supabase authentication (email + Google sign-in)

## Pages

- https://www.cvchapchap.com — Homepage
- https://www.cvchapchap.com/template — CV template selection (start building your CV)
- https://www.cvchapchap.com/create — CV builder introduction
- https://www.cvchapchap.com/letter — Cover letter builder
- https://www.cvchapchap.com/blog — Career advice blog for East African job seekers
- https://www.cvchapchap.com/affiliate — Affiliate programme overview
- https://www.cvchapchap.com/affiliate/register — Join the affiliate programme
- https://www.cvchapchap.com/auth/login — Sign in
- https://www.cvchapchap.com/auth/register — Create an account
- https://www.cvchapchap.com/privacy — Privacy policy
- https://www.cvchapchap.com/terms — Terms of service

## Target Audience

Job seekers in Tanzania and East Africa — including fresh graduates, experienced professionals, and career changers — who need professional CVs suited to the local job market.
